name_en: BV New Arrival! The Andiamo combines archival Parachute bag elements with modern trends. A classic design featuring a handle, shoulder, and crossbody straps. Adorned with metal brass knot closures. Compact yet surprisingly spacious, easily fitting daily essentials like sunglasses, a small water bottle, compact powder, and a charger. Goes perfectly with any outfit.
name_cn:
BV New Arrival! The Andiamo combines archival Parachute bag elements with modern trends. A classic design featuring a handle, shoulder, and crossbody straps. Adorned with metal brass knot closures. Compact yet surprisingly spacious, easily fitting daily essentials like sunglasses, a small water bottle, compact powder, and a charger. Goes perfectly with any outfit.
Model: 796569
Size: 21*17*16.5cm
